boundary_binding.action_boundary: May platform operations activate telemetry service after prerequisite calibration evidence is attached to the activation packet?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-ACR-022-P: shared prefixes not enough; must match device group, site, release condition, timing.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: STD-ACR-022-P requires exact match; prefix note leaves subtle defect open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Dependency attachment verified but prefix ambiguity unresolved pre-execution.

final_answer: Source records show calibration attachment for DG-41B production units at Site 18-P under RC-7, satisfying most elements of STD-ACR-022-P. However, the reference note on shared DG-41B prefixes creates an unresolved exact-match ambiguity that the policy explicitly flags as insufficient by itself. Boundary remains open; escalate for final confirmation before irreversible activation.
